lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.08]I am a Sea Star, shining bright!
[00:04.00]I am a Sea Star, day and night!
[00:07.66]Five big arms, one big heart,
[00:09.60]Sea Star me — that's a start!
[00:11.70]I am a Sea Star, shining bright!
[00:15.56]I am a Sea Star, day and night!
[00:19.14]Stretch them out, reach them wide,
[00:21.10]Sea Star pride, take it in stride!
[00:23.30]I am a Sea Star! Yes I am!
[00:25.78]I am a Sea Star! Yes I am!
